objective_summary:
Explore neural network architecture variants that reduce validation loss
compared with the current baseline while keeping implementation complexity
and compute cost under control.
selected_direction: Add residual projection around TinyModel placeholder

candidate_directions.title: Add residual projection around TinyModel placeholder
candidate_directions.rationale: This tests whether Phase C can apply a concrete architecture-style modification to the demo model instead of only running validation. It also exercises the downstream code-change summary path.
candidate_directions.implementation_hint: Modify project/nn-architecture/src/nn_architecture/model.py by adding residual-projection metadata to TinyModel.describe().

candidate_directions.title: Add explicit model-shape metadata to TinyModel
candidate_directions.rationale: This makes the demo model easier to validate and debug by exposing dimensions in a structured output.
candidate_directions.implementation_hint: Extend TinyModel.describe() with additional shape-related fields.

candidate_directions.title: Add optional gated-path metadata to TinyModel
candidate_directions.rationale: A gated-path placeholder is orthogonal to residual projection and can later map to real architectural gating experiments.
candidate_directions.implementation_hint: Add use_gated_path and gate_type fields to TinyModel.

deduplicated_directions.title: Add residual projection around TinyModel placeholder
deduplicated_directions.rationale: Although exp_0003 selected this idea, it was not actually implemented. Repeating it is justified because the new Phase C implementation hook now exists.
deduplicated_directions.implementation_hint: Modify project/nn-architecture/src/nn_architecture/model.py by adding residual-projection metadata to TinyModel.describe().

deduplicated_directions.title: Add optional gated-path metadata to TinyModel
deduplicated_directions.rationale: Distinct from residual projection and useful as a future scaffold-safe architecture path.
deduplicated_directions.implementation_hint: Add use_gated_path and gate_type fields to TinyModel.

code_change_summary: Applied demo residual-projection metadata change to project/nn-architecture/src/nn_architecture/model.py
